The '''QuasarFire Turbolaser Turret''' was a ground-based emplacement weapon produced by [[Taim & Bak/Legends|Taim & Bak]]. These [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] were produced with their own [[Power generator/Legends|power generators]]. Six QuasarFires were used by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] to defend the [[Stars' End/Legends|Stars' End]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]].<ref name="HSatCSS" />
